introSection:
Mini Coaster (Japanese: ミニコースター) is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Sweets Hotel Ikebukuro in Ikebukuro, Toshima, Tokyo, Japan. It is located on the balcony of Room 401, the hotel's presidential suite.

It opened with the hotel on 17 March 2025.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The coaster features a small, oval layout, with no hills, and a small chain lift powered by an exercise bike. It has white track and supports, and in the middle of the ride, there are chairs shaped like ice cream waffle cones.

fullText:
Mini Coaster (Japanese: ミニコースター) is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Sweets Hotel Ikebukuro in Ikebukuro, Toshima, Tokyo, Japan. It is located on the balcony of Room 401, the hotel's presidential suite.

It opened with the hotel on 17 March 2025.

The coaster features a small, oval layout, with no hills, and a small chain lift powered by an exercise bike. It has white track and supports, and in the middle of the ride, there are chairs shaped like ice cream waffle cones.
